meaning: vt.骑得比...更好,安然度过风暴
examples: An Apple-exclusive edition of OutRide is also available, in all white with a silver aluminum bezel.
OutRide is now available at mophie.com and the App is immediately available for download in the App Store.
What this means is simple: once you get your iPhone into the Outride, that display is staying on for the duration.
